title: AI PPT Generator
description: Generate outline, content and layout from a topic and export as presentation
topic_placeholder: e.g. Product launch, Q4 summary, Tech share
outline_label: Outline (use --- to separate slides; first line = title, lines starting with - = bullets)
outline_placeholder:
Slide 1 title
- Point one
- Point two
---
Slide 2 title
- Point…
tip: Use --- on its own line to separate slides. First line of each block is the title; lines starting with - or • become bullet points.
error_outline: Please add at least one slide with a title
